issues.issue: Broken og:image meta tag - malformed attribute causes parser failure. The tag reads: <meta property="<meta property= instead of <meta property="og:image". This is likely a template copy/paste error.

og:description significantly shorter than English counterpart. English: 103 chars, French: 68 chars. Should be roughly equivalent in scope.

pages_with_all_required_meta: index.html (EN) - all tags present and correct
notes.og_image_status: Only 1 of 14 pages with og:image intent has valid syntax. 13 have broken syntax, 1 (fr/communities) is entirely missing. Home page (index.html) is the only page with correctly formed og:image.
notes.hreflang_consistency_note: All pages have proper hreflang cross-references (en + fr + x-default). Canonical URLs on French pages correctly point to their own French URLs, and English canonicals point to English URLs. Cross-language hreflang alternates are correctly set.
notes.json_ld: All English pages have FAQPage schema (how-to, troubleshooting, accessories). All pages have BreadcrumbList schema. French pages also have FAQPage where English counterparts do.
notes.favicon_tags: Home page has comprehensive favicon setup (ico, svg, png 48x48, png 192x192, apple-touch-icon). Sub-pages use only favicon.svg — consider adding full favicon set for consistency.
notes.lang_switcher: All pages have language switcher in body. English pages show 🇬🇧 EN as current + link to 🇫🇷 FR. French pages show link to EN + FR as current.
